title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Charitable Endowments Act, 1890. (2) It extends to the whole of India, 1***, 2***; and (3) It shall come into force on the first day of October, 1890.
footnote: 1. The words "except the State of Jammu and Kashmir" omitted by Act 34 of 2019, s. 95 and the Fifth Schedule (w.e.f. 31-10- 2019). 2. The words "inclusive of British Baluchistan" omitted by the A.O. 1948.
